contactPage.title: Contact
contactPage.subtitle: Would you like to book language lessons or ask a question about the courses?

intro.title: Feel free to write
intro.text: Whether you are interested in one-to-one lessons, online lessons or a specific learning goal, just write briefly what kind of support you need and what your current language level is.

response.text: I will get back to you as soon as possible, and we can discuss which lesson format suits you best.

email.title: Contact by email
email.text: The easiest way to send an inquiry is by email:

provider.title: Provider
provider.name: Valeria Language Lessons

contentLiability.title: Liability for content
contentLiability.text: The contents of this website have been created with great care. However, no guarantee can be given for the accuracy, completeness or timeliness of the content.

linkLiability.title: Liability for links
linkLiability.text: This website may contain links to external websites. The respective operators are solely responsible for their content.

copyright.title: Copyright
copyright.text: The content and works created on this website are subject to German copyright law. Any use beyond the limits of copyright law requires the prior consent of the respective rights holders.
